overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting a Viking-era character exploring the candlelit interior of a Gothic stone church. The character follows a robed NPC through the sacred space, passing stained glass windows and stone pillars toward the altar area.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit stone entry hall of a Gothic church, with a large stained glass window on the left casting colored light. The character walks forward following a robed NPC guide toward a large stone archway doorway at the far end of the hall.

segments.scene_description: The character passes through an ornately carved stone doorway into the main nave, where tall stained glass windows rise on the right. The guide NPC stops to bow in prayer near the window as the character continues walking toward the distant altar area.

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the altar area, walking on a red carpet runner toward a raised stone platform. Other robed NPCs stand along the sides as the character ascends the steps, with tall stained glass windows now closer on the right.

agents.ego_description: moving past the altar and continuing toward the far end of the sanctuary

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the stone altar into the sanctuary area, with a large central stained glass window visible ahead. The space opens up with stone pillars now on the right as the character continues exploring the cathedral interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit entry hall through the expansive, candlelit interior of a Gothic cathedral toward its central sanctuary. It begins in a stone hall where a stained glass window casts colored light, following a robed NPC guide through a large stone archway. As the camera passes through the ornately carved doorway, the scene opens into the main nave with towering windows on the right and the guide pausing in prayer. The movement then shifts toward the altar area, gliding along a red carpet runner and ascending a raised stone platform past other robed figures. Finally, the camera moves beyond the stone altar into the sanctuary, where the space expands further to reveal stone pillars and a large central stained glass window.
